phdOffers.institution: Heriot-Watt University — Edinburgh Business School
phdOffers.title: EPSRC PhD — AI and Causal Inference for Labour Market Resilience
phdOffers.subject: Empirical research on AI adoption, labour-market adjustment, regional resilience, and inequality using vacancy data, NLP, network analysis, and causal inference; secondary fit for finance via labour/inequality and policy angles.
